pattern: A single linear scan tracks the current run length and resets it on a character change, recording the longest run of each symbol to compare at the end.
hints: Walk the string once, growing a counter while the character stays the same and resetting when it flips.
Keep two maxima, one for the best run of ones seen and one for the best run of zeros.
Return true only when the longest run of ones is strictly greater than the longest run of zeros.

edge_inputs.description: ones run just edges out zeros
all ones at length one hundred

stress.description: random binary strings of varied length
